allow: PowerShell($paths = @\("$env:ProgramFiles\\nodejs\\node.exe", "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\nodejs\\node.exe", "$env:APPDATA\\nvm", "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\fnm", "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Volta", "$env:USERPROFILE\\scoop\\apps\\nodejs"\); foreach \($p in $paths\) { "{0} : {1}" -f $p, \(Test-Path $p\) }; winget list --id OpenJS.NodeJS 2>$null | Select-Object -Last 5)

PowerShell($zip = Join-Path "C:\\Users\\Keisuke\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\claude\\C--Users-Keisuke-myblogsite\\a9cd4ebe-8bc9-4f9d-b5e4-5cd356a8c976\\scratchpad" "node-v24.18.0-win-x64.zip"; $dest = Join-Path $env:LOCALAPPDATA "Programs"; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force $dest | Out-Null; Expand-Archive -Path $zip -DestinationPath $dest -Force; $nodeDir = Join-Path $dest "node-v24.18.0-win-x64"; $target = Join-Path $dest "nodejs"; if \(Test-Path $target\) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force $target -Confirm:$false }; Rename-Item $nodeDir "nodejs"; & \(Join-Path $target "node.exe"\) -v)
PowerShell($env:Path = "$\(Join-Path $env:LOCALAPPDATA 'Programs\\nodejs'\);$env:Path"; npm create astro@latest . -- --template minimal --install --no-git --yes 2>&1 | Out-String)
PowerShell($env:Path = "$\(Join-Path $env:LOCALAPPDATA 'Programs\\nodejs'\);$env:Path"; npx astro add tailwind mdx --yes 2>&1 | Out-String)
PowerShell($env:Path = "$\(Join-Path $env:LOCALAPPDATA 'Programs\\nodejs'\);$env:Path"; npx astro add sitemap --yes 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 8; npm i @astrojs/rss 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 2)
